advanced-accessory-system.name: Advanced Accessory System
advanced-accessory-system.config.comment: Hide the rendered helmet model and its equipped render-state layers without removing equipment attributes.
Hide the rendered chest armor model and its equipped render-state layers without removing equipment attributes.
Hide the rendered leggings model and its equipped render-state layers without removing equipment attributes.
Hide the rendered boots model and its equipped render-state layers without removing equipment attributes.
When a head item matched by AAS_boat is worn, matching nearby entities from AAS_boat_auto_pick_up.allowed within this radius will be automatically picked up by the player.
When ejecting your passengers from the hotkey, apply this acceleration magnitude in the vehicle player's current look direction.
Increase the accumulated acceleration magnitude by this value each tick while charging.
Press this hotkey to open the shulker box on your head.
Open the Advanced Accessory System malilib config screen.
advanced-accessory-system.config.name.to: Add/remove targeted entity to AAS boat auto-pickup list
advanced-accessory-system.config.prettyN: Add/remove targeted entity to AAS boat auto-pickup list
advanced-accessory-system.config.comment: Press this hotkey to add or remove the entity under your crosshair to the AAS boat auto-pickup list. The config file is located at /config/advanced-accessory-system.json.
Press this hotkey to eject your own passengers.
Hold this hotkey to charge the ejection acceleration magnitude for supported passengers.
advanced-accessory-system.message.boatAu: %s is now an AAS auto-pickup target
%s is no longer an AAS auto-pickup target
